english_gloss: so-and-so, such, what have you, etcetera

sentences.text: Dedim ki kitap al [falan] al, o da dinlemedi.
sentences.note: I told him to buy a book or whatever, he didn't listen
if you want such-and-such we can do it
the child needs to write written texts etc.

recall_prompts.prompt: Isim tahrifi veya belirsizlik anlatmak. Ne söylersin?
